category_title: Elementary students with severe behavioral disorders exhibiting high-frequency off-task and aggressive behaviors
minimal_context: The student is reviewing reading materials about an upcoming holiday in preparation for a classroom discussion.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please review the reading materials about the upcoming holiday on your desk. Read it quietly to yourself, and then we will have a classroom discussion.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Speaking to the student next to him while performing the learning assignment that does not require talking) I don't want to read this holiday story.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just focus on your reading material.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Speaking to himself) This is boring. The holiday is stupid anyway.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shifts his entire body away from the reading materials and the white board, twisting around in his chair to look at the back of the room for more than 5 seconds.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please review the reading materials about the upcoming holiday on your desk. Read it quietly to yourself, and then we will have a classroom discussion.

STUDENT: (Speaking to the student next to him while performing the learning assignment that does not require talking) I don't want to read this holiday story.

TUTOR: Just focus on your reading material.

STUDENT: (Speaking to himself) This is boring. The holiday is stupid anyway.

TUTOR: Please keep trying to read.

STUDENT: (Shifts his entire body away from the reading materials and the white board, twisting around in his chair to look at the back of the room for more than 5 seconds.)

task.content: Reading and storytelling. The topics were related to an upcoming holiday and nature events. Each segment included a brief reading task, in which students were asked to review the reading materials, ask questions, and then participate in classroom discussion.

context.environment: Self-contained classroom with learning stimuli displayed on the white board

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher exhibits lower frequencies of interactions with the students, delayed contingent responding to students, and avoidance from proximity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Moving (i.e., head or body shift or twist to directions other than the location of the learning stimuli for more than 5 seconds)
related_quotes: moving (i.e., head or body shift or twist to directions other than the location of the learning stimuli for more than 5 seconds)

behavior_patterns.condition: While the teacher talks or while performing a learning assignment that does not require talking
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Talking (i.e., speaking to self or to others)
related_quotes: talking (i.e., speaking to self or to others while the teacher talks or while performing a learning assignment that does not require talking)
